author: davidme6
changelog: V3.1.0-feishu-interactive: Added Feishu two-way interactive communication. Users can now @HealthGuardian in the Feishu group and get instant automated responses. Features include: intelligent message recognition for water intake, exercise, food, weight, and sleep tracking; real-time data analysis and personalized recommendations; automatic progress calculation; motivational feedback. Complete Feishu app setup guide included. Server listens on port 8080 for Feishu events. Full documentation in FEISHU_APP_SETUP.md.
